title: 300 Pack MINI Makeup Spatulas, Reusable Cream Tip Spatulas Frosted Cosmetic Spatulas Scoops by Accmor
description:
Premium quality : these spatulas are made from polypropylene, smooth surface without sharp edges; The mask tip spatula is 8 cm/ 3.2 inch long and 1.5 cm/ 0.6 inch wide, BPA free.
300 Pieces: 150 packs facial spatulas in 5 colors are enough for your spare or replacement; A good makeup accessory for ladies and girls.
Keep cosmetic clean: a good beauty skin care tool, the cosmetic tip spatula can take cosmetic out from the jar for less mess and keeping it clean.
Convenient to carry: the plastic mask spatulas are comfortable to grip and convenient to carry in your makeup bag; Portable and lightweight
Wide usage: the cosmetic spatulas are good for applying make-up, such as facial cream, body cream and so on; also fit for DIY cosmetic products, sampling beauty products, etc.
reviews_5s: I like them.These mini makeup spatulas are a game-changer for getting every last bit out of jars and tubes. They’re small, flexible, and super easy to clean, making them perfect for both makeup and skincare products. I love how hygienic they are compared to dipping fingers into jars. A simple yet essential tool for anyone who hates wasting product!I have never purchased anything like this before. Love them! Use daily. I have long nails which makes it hard to get creams out of some jars. I even bought my granddaughter a glass jar (w/lid) and filled it with these for her birthday!These are a nice size with a corner on them so you get the last corner of the jar. A great buy for the price!I use these for body butter samples. They're perfect for that. They are nice and durable. I've never had any issues. I like the fact that they come in different colors.These are perfect if you do hair / makeup. Keep cleaniness and no cross contamination. You can safely transfer products from their container to client. Don’t forget to not reuse them!!!!! They give you a great bulk for buck. I even add them to my aftercare kits.I used this to give away in gifts with samples of lotion. Great quality. Look good. Nice colors. Made very well. Just what I was looking for.Use these everyday. They are perfect for scooping creams out of jars and keeping your creams sanitary and your fingernails clean. They are well made and they are reasonable enough to continue purchasing.These mini spatulas are sturdy fir use. They are a perfect size for facial and hand cream applicationsI really like these. they aren’t flimsy and work well
